Title: Increases the interest rate for late payments due on construction contracts; repealer
Summary: Increases the interest rate for late payments due on construction contracts from one to two percent; includes a change order as part of the definition of construction contract; defines change order; repeals exceptions for lower Manhattan construction contracts.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the general business law, in relation to increasing the interest rate for late payments due on construction contracts; and to repeal section 756-e of the general business law, relating to exceptions for construction contracts in lower Manhattan
